features: LIP GLOW OIL: perfect blend of a silky lip oil with a lightly tinted gloss effect that moisturises and softens your lips instantly. This nutritious formula provides a natural hint of colour with a supple finish.

ABOUT APPLECRANBERRY LIP OIL: Our tinted lip glow oil is formulated with apple seed oil and cranberry fruit extract to instantly moisturize and keep lips smooth. This unique formula helps lips appear glossy, clear, and more kissable and youthful.

ENHANCED DURABILITY & LONG-LASTING HYDRATION : Our Lip Oil is designed for all-day wear, providing long-lasting moisture, strength, and resilience to keep your lips soft and supple. Its advanced formula ensures deep hydration without frequent reapplication, maintaining a vibrant, glossy finish. Clinical studies confirm its effectiveness, with 52.84% of hydration retained even after 24 hours, proving its superior longevity and lasting nourishment.

TRAVEL FRIENDLY and PERFECT FOR GIFTING: This compact and lightweight lip oil is perfect for travel and it is ideal for any occasion, this lip oil makes a thoughtful and luxurious gift for friends and loved ones.

PLUMPING EFFECT: Our moisturising lip oil provides a natural yet visible plumping effect, enhancing the fullness of your lips for a juicy, voluptuous look. Enjoy the sensation of a fuller pout with a more natural look than with lip gloss.
EASY APPLICATION: Comes with a pointed doe foot applicator that makes precise application a breeze.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Why choose nooni tinted lip oil over lip stain or lip gloss? Lip oil is a product that effectively delivers moisture to the lips while also providing the tinting function of a lip stain. It provides moisture and nutrition to your lips with a glossy feel! How long does the hydration really last on lips? This product helps maintain lip hydration for 24 hours. Based on our research studies, 52.84% of hydration remained after 24 hours. Experience this long-lasting, glowy beauty with nooni lip oils! Can this be used with any of other lip products? Absolutely! You can easily pair this lip oil as a lip moisturizer with other lip products. For a beautifully glossy look with lasting hydration, try layering it over your favorite lip colour. It will give you that perfect, glossy finish. Does oil feel sticky on the lips? This lightweight oil boasts excellent adhesion, ensuring long-lasting moisture without the stickiness. Enjoy effortless lip care with this weightless formula. Why is the colour different from the pictures once applied? Our PETA-certified colourants may cause slight variations between the product's external colour and its applied shade on different skin tones. Rest assured, future nooni lip oil colours will match their packaging.
